title: fix link to Maintainers file
body:
Small change to fix a broken link/reference to the list of maintainers of buildah in the CONTRIBUTING.md file.

#### What type of PR is this?

/kind documentation

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

The CONTRIBUTING.md doc's link to maintainers is incorrect 404s due to the wrong file name and should point to the .md file.

#### How to verify it

In the current repo go to the [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#becoming-a-maintainer) file, scroll to the very bottom and click on the link to view the maintainers. It currently 404s!

If you access my fork of the repo and check the [same link](https://github.com/JayKayy/buildah/blob/fix-maintainers-link/CONTRIBUTING.md#becoming-a-maintainer) it correctly sends the reader to the list of maintainers. 

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

<!--
Automatically closes linked issue when PR is merged.
Uncomment the following comment block and include the issue
number or None on one line.
Usage: `Fixes #<issue number>`, or `Fixes (paste link of issue)`, or `None`.
-->

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

NONE
